description_long: This is an elegant chandelier with eight evenly spaced cylindrical lampshades arranged in a circular pattern. Each lampshade is supported by a gracefully curved metal arm that extends outward from a central hub. The structure is suspended from a robust chain, which connects to the ceiling, providing both support and a decorative touch. The lampshades appear to be made of a matte or fabric-like material, contrasting with the smooth, hard finish of the metal frame. The overall design is symmetrical and balanced, with a classic yet modern aesthetic suitable for upscale urban interiors. The chandelier's clean lines and uniform arrangement make it a striking focal point in any room.
description: A sophisticated eight-arm chandelier with cylindrical shades and a smooth metal frame, suspended by a decorative chain. Its symmetrical, modern-classic design makes it ideal for stylish urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eight cylindrical lampshades and the central hub, with the chain attachment clearly visible above.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still displaying the full circular arrangement of shades and the elegant curvature of the arms.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, highlighting the uniform spacing of the lampshades and the robust central structure.
description_view_3: Final view in the rotation, maintaining visibility of all arms and shades, with the chain and central hub prominent.
